300.s: The war is over and the Straw Hat Pirates with the Shandia warriors are resting. Also, Pagaya turns out to have survived Enel's wrath and he is alive.

301.s: The Straw Hat Pirates try to steal the gold and treasure from the ruins of Shandora. Robin is with the Shandia, who recently found the Shandorian Golden Belfry Bell. The bell is revealed to have a poneglyph in it. Robin deciphers the poneglyph and explains how the poneglyphs are connected. She also finds out that the Shandia's battle for the protection of the bell has long been won and that Gol D. Roger knew how to read Poneglyphs. Robin then arrives with the Shandia and the Straw Hats think they are chasing after them, so they make a run for it. The Shandia are confused as to why the Straw Hats would want to run away and not want to take their offering of a gold pillar. Robin laughs and says that it's possible that they don't want it anymore. The Straw Hats continue running away.

302.s: The Shandia Chief asks Gan Fall to be the God of Skypiea once again and he accepts. The Straw Hat Pirates with the help of an Octopus Balloon go down to the Blue Seas.

303.s: While Donquixote Doflamingo punishes Bellamy for being defeated by Luffy, the Straw Hat Pirates continues their journey on the Octopus Balloon.

304.s: The Straw Hat Pirates land on the Long Ring Long Land and there they meet Shelly, a tall horse.

305.s: The guy that fell from the bamboo is Tonjit, the owner of Shelly. He was stuck up there for 10 whole years. Foxy is introduced and challenges them to a Davy Back Fight.

306.s: Foxy and Luffy agree with the Davy Back Fight despite Usopp trying to stop Luffy. After all rules and preparations are finished, the Straw Hat Pirates and the Foxy Pirates prepare to start the Donut Race.

307.s: The Straw Hat Pirates and the Foxy Pirates begin their race around Long Ring Long Land Island. The Foxy Pirates attack the Straw Hat racers from the shoreline, until they are defeated by the rest of the crew. Usopp uses an Impact Dial to send the Straw Hats' boat into the lead. As the race gets to the "Long Coral" section, Foxy and Hamburg appear on the shoreline.

308.s: Zoro, Luffy, Sanji & Chopper have stopped fighting the Foxy Pirates. Nami, Usopp & Robin pass through the various challenges of the Donut Race. Foxy employs various deceitful tactics along the way to slow them down, but they are all foiled as the Taru Tiger approaches the finish line. With no other options, Foxy reveals his Devil Fruit ability.

309.s: Porche's team win the Donut Race with Foxy's help. Foxy explains his Devil Fruit, and demonstrates it. He chooses Chopper to join him. The second round of the Davy Back Fight starts, with Sanji being the ball and the appearance of the "Groggy Monsters", the returning champions of the Groggy Ring.

310.s: In the Davy Back Fight Round 2: Groggy Ring begins. Zoro and Sanji compete in the Groggy Ring Match against the undefeated champions, the Groggy Monsters. On the sidelines, the remaining Straw Hat Pirates cheer them on.

311.s: The Groggy Monsters are playing unfair, by using weapons and hitting them very hard. The referee pretends that he does not see anything. Sanji and Zoro decide to work together for 10 seconds.

312.s: Hamburg and Pickles are defeated: Sanji serves Big Pan to Zoro, and Zoro scores.

313.s: With Sanji and Zoro's victory, the second round of the Davy Back Fight is over. Luffy takes Chopper back to the crew. Now, Luffy will fight Foxy in the third and final round.

314.s: The Fight between Afro Luffy and Foxy Begins.

315.s: Luffy continues his battle with Foxy. During the battle Foxy pulls several tricks on Luffy.

316.s: Luffy continues to fight despite falling prey to Foxy and his tricks. The fight continues from the kitchen into a room full of mirrors. Foxy unveils his last weapon, Gorilla Puncher 13. Luffy uses his wits to escape the death chamber and continues the battle outside. Foxy manages to knock Luffy down multiple times, but Luffy keeps getting back up because he is determined to save his crew.

317.s: Luffy is injured once again by Foxy's Foxy Fighter. During the intense combat, Foxy tries to slow Luffy down with his Noro Noro no Mi, but Luffy reflects it back with a mirror. Luffy finishes Foxy with Gomu Gomu Flail and wins the competition when Foxy is unable to fight back within ten seconds.

318.s: Foxy falls into the ocean, the landing point outside the battle field. Luffy and the Straw Hats celebrate. Later on, Luffy wakes up and does not remember the result of the fight, until being told by Zoro. Foxy attempts to attack Luffy by shaking his hand and then doing an overhead throw, but fails. Luffy claims Foxy's flag as his prize and gives him a newly re-designed one made by himself. Luffy and the crew then head over to Tonjit and Shelly and chat with them. A strange man known as Admiral Aokiji appears and comments on Nico Robin's growth into a fine woman.

319.t: Admiral Aokiji of the Marine Headquarters
319.s: The Straw Hat Pirates find out that Aokiji is an admiral from Marine Headquarters. Robin explains about the Admirals. Usopp, while hiding behind Zoro, yells at Aokiji to go find other pirates with bounties that is higher than Luffy's. Aokiji hits on Nami, which annoys Usopp and enrages Sanji. Aokiji acts lazy, to the point of being too lazy to count. Aokiji states that he overheard the conversation about getting Tonjit home and decides to help him. Aokiji reveals his Devil Fruit ability by freezing the sea and the Sea King so that Tonjit could cross the sea. Tonjit and the Straw Hat Pirates say their good-byes. Aokiji suddenly exclaims that the Straw Hat Pirates should all just die.

320.s: Aokiji provokes Robin and she ends up attacking Aokiji. Aokiji quickly recovers from Robin's attack. Aokiji tries to attack Robin but is stopped by Zoro and Sanji. Aokiji grabs Zoro's arm and Sanji's leg. Luffy runs in for an attack. Aokiji freezes Zoro's arm and Sanji's leg. Luffy punches Aokiji but gets his arm frozen. Aokiji leans over and freezes Robin completely. Aokiji makes two attempts at trying to break Robin's frozen body but Luffy stops his first attempt and Usopp grabs Robin during his second attempt. Luffy orders Usopp and Chopper to bring Robin back to the Going Merry to thaw her. Luffy then challenges Aokiji to a duel.

321.s: Luffy fights with Admiral Aokiji one-on-one, however he is defeated. Aokiji leaves without killing Luffy. Zoro and Sanji soon arrive and take him back to their ship. Moments later Chopper says that both Luffy's and Robin's hearts are beating again but they still need to rest.

322.s: On their way to the next island, the Straw Hat Pirates spot something interesting swimming in the water and decide to follow it.

323.s: The Straw Hat Pirates arrive in Water 7.

324.t: Adventure in the City on the Water
324.s: Luffy, Nami and Usopp explore the city of Water 7. Robin and Chopper are shopping in the city. Sanji leaves the Going Merry to buy food. Zoro is left alone on the ship when mysterious attackers arrive at the ship.

325.s: The bounty hunters, the Franky Family, show up on the Going Merry while the others get the gold exchanged and Robin disappears after passing a mysterious masked man.

326.s: Robin is seen with the masked man while Kaku begins evaluating the ship. Luffy, Nami, and Usopp meet Iceburg and Kalifa.

327.s: Luffy, Usopp and Nami are shown around Dock 1 before Kaku returns with to report his findings during his evaluation of Going Merry.

328.s: Luffy and Nami learn the fate of the Going Merry and realize Usopp has been taken by the Franky Family along with 200,000,000.

329.s: Nami informs the other members of what happened while Usopp tries to retrieve the money on his own.

330.s: The Straw Hat Pirates attack the Franky Family to get revenge for Usopp and finally decide it is time to say goodbye to the Going Merry.

331.s: Luffy and Usopp argue over what to do with the Going Merry, with Usopp wanting to keep repairing it and Luffy wanting to get a ship.

332.s: Usopp and Luffy fight for the Going Merry.

333.s: The duel between Usopp and Luffy continues with a victor finally emerging in the end.

334.t: Big Trouble in the Secret Room
334.s: It is the morning after Usopp and Luffy's duel and the Straw Hat Pirates learn that Iceburg was shot.

335.s: An angry Franky searches for the Straw Hats, while it is revealed that Aqua Laguna is due to hit the island. Iceburg finally regains consciousness and reveals that there were two attackers, one being Nico Robin.

336.s: Franky and Luffy begin to fight outside the shipyard while the Galley-La Company conclude that the Straw Hats are involved in the attack on Iceburg and go to confront them.

337.t: Protectors of the City of Water
337.s: Luffy is confronted by the Galley-La Company members and it is announced to the residents of Water 7 that the Straw Hats are the culprits.

338.s: The Galley-La Company continue to attack Luffy until Franky intervenes and destroys the shipyard.

339.s: Luffy finally confronts Iceburg about the shooting incident while Robin is seen meeting with members of an organization known as CP9.

340.s: While the Straw Hats are being chased, Sanji and Chopper finally come face to face with Robin.

341.s: The Straw Hats figure out that Robin is most likely going to make another attempt on Iceburg's life and decide to try and catch her to discover the truth.

342.s: The Franky Family think of a way to lure out the Straw Hat Pirates while the CP9 and Nico Robin begin an attack on the Galley-La Headquarters.

343.s: The assault on the Galley-La Headquarters continues with the Straw Hat Pirates finally arriving.

344.s: The CP9 members continue to make light work of the Galley-La Company while Iceburg and Paulie reveal that the blueprints are fake.

345.s: Luffy arrives at the Galley-La Headquarters while the CP9 members reveal their identities.

346.s: The agents of CP9 deduce who has the blueprints while the four Straw Hat Pirates with Paulie make their entrance.

347.s: The Straw Hat Pirates and Paulie confronts the CP9 members and Nico Robin.

348.s: Nico Robin begins to leave while the Straw Hat Pirates try to get past CP9 to stop her.

349.s: Rob Lucci shows his Devil Fruit ability while the Galley-La Headquarters continues to be engulfed in flames.

350.s: The CP9 look for Franky's location while he is at a hideout. Franky and Usopp chat about the events which they have been involved in.

351.s: Franky continues to try to get Usopp to accept the Going Merry can never sail again.

352.s: The CP9 enter the hideout and demand Franky to hand over the blueprints of Pluton.

353.s: The story goes back 22 years to explain the events that unfolded around Tom's Workers.

354.s: Tom's Workers build the Sea Train.

355.s: As the day of Tom's trial draws closer, Spandam arrives.

356.s: Tom's Workers are blamed for the attack on the court.

357.s: Cutty Flam attempts to stop Tom being taken away by Spandam.

358.s: The chapter talks about the events after Tom's death and the CP9 prepare to take Franky away.

359.s: Iceburg explains Robin's true motive for causing so much trouble.

360.s: Paulie explains to the people that the Straw Hat Pirates are not the culprits but does not tell them everything he knows. He gets the mob to follow Chopper so they can search for the rest of the crew. Nami goes her own way so she can rush to the Sea Train. As Nami nears the station, Sanji, ahead of her, approaches the train.

361.s: The Sea Train leaves Water 7 with Robin, Usopp, Franky, and the CP9 agents on board.

362.s: Sanji makes his way into the 7th cart and easily defeats its representative, Jerry. Meanwhile everyone at Water 7 continues their search for Luffy and Zoro and eventually spot Luffy as the Aqua Laguna is about to arrive!

363.s: Nami and Chopper make their way towards the stuck Luffy and Zoro as the Aqua Laguna arrives.

364.s: The Straw Hat Pirates escape from the Aqua Laguna and are determined to go save the others at Enies Lobby.

365.s: Sanji defeats all in the next cart which is where Franky and Usopp are located while the other Straw Hat Pirates prepare to leave Water 7 using the second Sea Train, the "Rocketman"!

366.s: The Rocketman leaves with the Straw Hat Pirates, Franky Family and Galley-La Company as Sanji finally contacts Nami.

367.s: The Rocketman passes through the Aqua Laguna while Sanji and Franky are saved by a mysterious masked man named Sogeking.

368.s: After detaching the previous two coaches, the three on the Puffing Tom make their way to coach four.

369.s: Sanji fights Wanze while Franky prepares to battle Nero. Meanwhile, Sogeking has managed to reach the first coach!

370.s: Nico Robin and Sogeking talk in the first car while the others continue their battles.

372.s: The battles aboard the Puffing Tom continue with Sanji defeating Wanze.

373.s: Those on the Puffing Tom attempt to escape the CP9.

374.s: Nico Robin and Franky are once again in the hands of the CP9.

375.s: The Rocketman and Franky Family continue their way to Enies Lobby.

376.s: The group prepares to enter Enies Lobby.

377.t: Great Battle on the Judiciary Island!!
377.s: Monkey D. Luffy makes his way to the main island just as the Franky Family and Galley-La Company arrive on Enies Lobby.

378.s: The Franky Family try to pass through the giants, while Luffy makes his way past the Marines on the main island.

379.s: The CP9 reunion appears more of a comedy show as Monkey D. Luffy continues on his way towards the courthouse.

380.s: The Rocketman crash lands into the main island.

381.s: The rest of the Straw Hat Pirates set foot on Enies Lobby. Nami's Perfect Clima-Tact's power is revealed, and the Straw Hats hurry to catch up with Luffy. Meanwhile Luffy fights Marines, and notice that his crew is here. Back in the scene, Paulie tells Zoro that if he ever meets Lucci, Kaku, or Kalifa, to tell them they are fired.

382.s: The Straw Hat Pirates charge in further while Spandam kicks and hurts Robin and Franky. Blueno notices that the snail phone's receiver is off the hook. After being dismissed by Spandam, he goes to check on things outside and meets Luffy.

383.s: Luffy tells Blueno to move and Blueno starts talking about the World Government. The rest of the Straw Hat Pirates, Galley-La Company and Franky Family charge in further meanwhile. Back at the scene, Luffy begins to clashes with Blueno. Sodom gets hurt in the battlefield and tells everyone to get off of him onto Gomorrah.

384.s: Sogeking talks with Oimo to find out that he and Kashii have been working at Enies Lobby for 50 years in order to "free" Dorry and Brogy from Impel Down. Sogeking tells Oimo that that story is a complete lie by the World Government since the Straw Hat Pirates met them recently. The others meanwhile charge in further. When they are at a pinch, Oimo and Kashii show up, appearing to be allies now, thanks to Sogeking.

385.s: Kaku and Kalifa are given devil fruits by Spandam and eat them. The Straw Hat Pirates charge in further, and Luffy continues to clash with Blueno.

386.s: The Straw Hat Pirates finally reach the last gates, and Spandam is notified of the damage caused by them.

387.s: The Straw Hat Pirates charge in further while Luffy fights Blueno and activates Gear 2 for the first time.

388.s: Luffy fights Blueno in his Gear 2 and beats him. The other Straw Hats rush to catch up with Luffy, and Luffy calls out to Robin.

389.s: Luffy talks with Robin who tells him to stay away and that she just wants to die. The CP9 are called and gather on the tower.

390.s: The rest of the Straw Hats fight to catch up to Luffy. Luffy talks with Robin, and the rest of the Straw Hats catch up and stand beside Luffy.

391.s: The Straw Hat Pirates wait for a response from Robin, and the story of Robin's history begins.

392.s: More of Robin's past is revealed.

393.s: More of Robin's past is revealed.

394.s: More of Robin's past is revealed.

395.s: More of Robin's past is revealed.

396.s: More of Robin's past is revealed.

397.t: In Hopes of Reaching the Future
397.s: More of Robin's past is revealed, and Saul dies.

398.s: Robin's life running away from the world is revealed. The flashback ends. Luffy tells Sogeking to burn the World Government's flag and the Straw Hat Pirates declare war to the world. Luffy tells Robin to say she wants to live, and she does. The Straw Hat Pirates get ready for a battle with the CP9.

399.s: The Straw Hat Pirates get ready for a fight. Franky burns the blueprints of Pluton. The Straw Hats burst into the main building of Enies Lobby on a Sea Train.
